text: At the beginning of this verse, the Latin inserts the words, ‘Keep thy favours for the merciful, and let the sinners go without their entertainment’, which appears to be a duplicate of verse 5, included by error. It has been omitted in the rendering given above, as fatally disturbing to the order of the sentence. There was no doubt some dislocation of the text here; the Greek, too, has a duplicate of verse 5 immediately after verse 7.
